Headline: Blue Line Service Delayed near Pulaski/Congress
ShortDescription: Blue Line trains are standing in both directions due to a loss of power near the area of Pulaski/Congress. Crews working to restore service.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Blue Line trains are standing in both directions due to a loss of power near the area of Pulaski/Congress.

At this time, also consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes, or using buses to other rail lines. These may include #53 Pulaski buses.

Personnel are working to restore service. Allow extra travel time.
